BUILD YOUR PLAN

Complete your intake form. Your personalised 12-week plan will be delivered to your email within 24 hours.

SECTION 1 — YOUR DETAILS

We'll build your plan around a safe, sustainable target. Up to 1kg loss per week over 12 weeks.

SECTION 2 — YOUR GOAL

Fat Loss

Lose body fat while preserving muscle

Muscle Building

Build size and increase strength

Maintenance and Recomposition

Improve body composition at current weight

Full commercial gym
Dumbbells only
Barbell and rack
Cables and machines
Resistance bands
No equipment bodyweight only

Tuesday

SECTION 4 — NUTRITION PREFERENCES

SECTION 5 — HEALTH AND INJURIES

Recent surgery (last 6 months)
Heart condition or chest pain during exercise
Severe joint pain that stops you training
Currently pregnant
Advised by a doctor not to exercise
Based on what you have shared we recommend speaking with your GP or physiotherapist before starting this programme. Please contact us at hello@plus4performance.com and we will assist you.
